rows.label: qev091201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Frye? Fog Christoph? You sure
you want to take this one on?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0002
rows.name: Very.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0003
rows.name: It's a perfect fit for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Besides, we've got some
Grade-A backup. Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev091201_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod confidently.

rows.label: qev091201_JNK0020
rows.name: Wait

rows.label: qev091201_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that you can't decide until
you know the mission details.

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0005_m
rows.name: You're even more brash than my brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0005_f
rows.name: You're even more brash than my brother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0006
rows.name:
But we deliver on our promises,
which makes it impressive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0007
rows.name: And so humble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Aw, you sound like Fog
Christoph. Always so cautious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0009
rows.name: That's the wiser course to take.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0010
rows.name: So, what? I'm an idiot?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0011
rows.name: No, I... I didn't mean it like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Look, I don't care how many of you go,
but be sure to brief everyone you take.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0013
rows.name: Yeah, yeah. Fog Christoph? Get on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0014
rows.name: All right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0015
rows.name: So then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0016
rows.name:
We have reports of what may be
a new resource in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Other teams have attempted to
collect it, but they all failed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0018
rows.name:
So I volunteered to perform a more
thorough survey and secure a sample.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0019
rows.name:
However, the area in question is
filled with many dangerous indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Which is why I asked
my brother for help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Yeah, as an Interceptor, I'm
pretty good at punching stuff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0022
rows.name:
But I leave all that resource-gathering
crap to you Landbanker.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Anyway, that's the deal. Would
you be willing to help us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0024
rows.name:
You gotta ask? We're a team.
Family, even! Help is a given.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0025
rows.name: I suppose it was a silly question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Let's all head to White Woods
and see what we can learn about
this mystery resource.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091201_MSG0027
rows.name: And also punch some stuff![ST:wait ]
